channel.title: Go on mo11om
channel.description: Recent content in Go on mo11om

item.title: NCTU Plus API
item.author: user@example.com (Hugo Author)
item.description: The Problema Building an authenticated web platform is straightforward when you own the identity system. NCTU Plus had a harder constraint: authentication must go through NYCU’s OAuth2 provider. The university controls user accounts, session validity, and profile data. Your API is a downstream consumer — you receive an authorization code, exchange it for a profile, and then issue your own session tokens. This creates a three-party trust chain: browser → NYCU OAuth → your API.
